'''鈭歯-b-h''' ('''kanabah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoothanize|zoothanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoothanize|zoothanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-b-h
|-
! Lemma
| kanabah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinabah|thinabah]] || [[word:jinabah|jinabah]] || [[word:shinabah|shinabah]] || [[word:kinabah|kinabah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunabah|thuthunabah]] || [[word:jujunabah|jujunabah]] || [[word:shushunabah|shushunabah]] || [[word:kukunabah|kukunabah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunabah|thunabah]] || [[word:junabah|junabah]] || [[word:shunabah|shunabah]] || [[word:kunabah|kunabah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunabah|thunabah]] || [[word:junabah|junabah]] || [[word:shunabah|shunabah]] || [[word:kunabah|kunabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenabah|thenabah]] || [[word:jenabah|jenabah]] || [[word:shenabah|shenabah]] || [[word:kenabah|kenabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonabah|thothonabah]] || [[word:jojonabah|jojonabah]] || [[word:shoshonabah|shoshonabah]] || [[word:kokonabah|kokonabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonabah|thonabah]] || [[word:jonabah|jonabah]] || [[word:shonabah|shonabah]] || [[word:konabah|konabah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonabah|thonabah]] || [[word:jonabah|jonabah]] || [[word:shonabah|shonabah]] || [[word:konabah|konabah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]] || [[word:nabah|nabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nabah|th忙nabah]] || [[word:j忙nabah|j忙nabah]] || [[word:sh忙nabah|sh忙nabah]] || [[word:k忙nabah|k忙nabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanabah|thathanabah]] || [[word:jajanabah|jajanabah]] || [[word:shashanabah|shashanabah]] || [[word:kakanabah|kakanabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanabah|thanabah]] || [[word:janabah|janabah]] || [[word:shanabah|shanabah]] || [[word:kanabah|kanabah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanabah|thanabah]] || [[word:janabah|janabah]] || [[word:shanabah|shanabah]] || [[word:kanabah|kanabah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanabah|shanabah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanabah|goshanabah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanabah|gokishanabah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanabahn眉|shanabahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanabahnkn眉|goshanabahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanabahn眉|gokishanabahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanabahsh毛|shanabahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanabahnksh毛|goshanabahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanabahsh毛|gokishanabahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanabahro|shanabahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanabahnkro|goshanabahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanabahro|gokishanabahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanabahmu|shanabahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanabahnkmu|goshanabahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanabahmu|gokishanabahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanabahsher|shanabahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanabahnksher|goshanabahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanabahsher|gokishanabahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanabahng|shanabahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanabahnkng|goshanabahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanabahng|gokishanabahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanabahya|shanabahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanabahnkya|goshanabahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanabahya|gokishanabahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanabahyam|shanabahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanabahnkyam|goshanabahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanabahyam|gokishanabahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanabahn眉sh毛|shanabahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanabahnkn眉sh毛|goshanabahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanabahn眉sh毛|gokishanabahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanabahn眉ro|shanabahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanabahnkn眉ro|goshanabahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanabahn眉ro|gokishanabahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanabahn眉mu|shanabahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanabahnkn眉mu|goshanabahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanabahn眉mu|gokishanabahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanabahsh毛n眉|shanabahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanabahnksh毛n眉|goshanabahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanabahsh毛n眉|gokishanabahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanabahsh毛ro|shanabahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanabahnksh毛ro|goshanabahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanabahsh毛ro|gokishanabahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanabahsh毛mu|shanabahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanabahnksh毛mu|goshanabahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanabahsh毛mu|gokishanabahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanabahron眉|shanabahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanabahnkron眉|goshanabahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanabahron眉|gokishanabahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanabahrosh毛|shanabahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanabahnkrosh毛|goshanabahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanabahrosh毛|gokishanabahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanabahromu|shanabahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanabahnkromu|goshanabahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanabahromu|gokishanabahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanabahmun眉|shanabahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanabahnkmun眉|goshanabahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanabahmun眉|gokishanabahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanabahmush毛|shanabahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanabahnkmush毛|goshanabahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanabahmush毛|gokishanabahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanabahmuro|shanabahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanabahnkmuro|goshanabahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanabahmuro|gokishanabahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|17228b0}}
